chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No.D-2384 of 2024 Mst. Musarrat Fatima and others Versus Zeeshan Shamsi and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No.10946/2024 (Urgent/App). 2. For order on Misc. No.10947/2024 (Stay/App). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 20.05.2024 Syed Murtaza Haider, Advocate for petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Urgency granted. 2-3) In pursuance of a preliminary decree, a property was put to auction through a sale proclamation and the discretion vests with the Court either to except the offer or otherwise. It is petitioners’ case that they were sole bidders who proposed the bid and Nazir submitted his report. The bid, as offered, was not accepted by the learned Judge and the matter was posted for fresh proclamation and auction accordingly. The order was challenged in civil revision application No.187/2023, however, with no consequence as far as the petitioners’ alleged rights are concerned. This petition has been filed under Article-199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan to invoke the jurisdiction of this Court. At the very outset, we are not the appellate court or the revisional court. The two forums below have exercised their jurisdiction and discretion vested with it. Neither any jurisdictional error nor any constitutional flaw is pointed out. The proclamation of sale provides a discretion to the learned Judge to accept it or otherwise, which the learned court did. The property is now kept for a fresh process of auction. The appellant and any other legal heir may participate in it and match it, as required in terms of scheme of Order-XXI CPC.

The property is now kept for a fresh process of auction. The appellant and any other legal heir may participate in it and match it, as required in terms of scheme of Order-XXI CPC. The petition merits no consideration and is dismissed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
